title: Hellfire Arrows
description: This mod adds client side fire trails behind  Bow which looks cool btw.
body:
# 🔥 Hellfire Arrows

Unleash blazing trails with every shot — ignite your world with fire-tipped fury!

## 🌟 Overview

Draw your bow… release… and watch the skies burn. Hellfire Arrows transform every shot into a spectacle of flames, scorching the air with blazing trails that ignite everything in their path. From silent hunts in the Overworld to brutal battles in the Nether, your arrows become weapons of fiery destruction. Compatible with both plain and enchanted bows, this mod makes every shot feel like a cinematic moment — fast, deadly, and unforgettable.

- ✔ Works with normal bows and enchanted bows
- ✔ Fully compatible with Fabric 1.20.1
- ✔ Lightweight, simple, and multiplayer-friendly

## ⚙ Compatibility

> ✅  Sodium

> ✅ Multiplayer ( just Client both need the mod)

## 🎮 New Hotkeys:

- Press M to toggle Hellfire Arrows ON/OFF

- Press P to hide/show particle trails

## 🌐 Connect with Me

Stay updated on my latest projects and mods!

📸 Instagram: @glowmart_456

▶️ YouTube: @Shirjeel_plays

💎 Patreon: Shirjeel_plays

📧 Email: workwithshirjeel@gmail.com

 **⚡ Light up your world, one arrow at a time!**
